caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt and a grey and black baseball cap with a circular logo on the front is positioned in front of a professional microphone. He wears large black headphones over his ears. The microphone is mounted on a black shock mount and arm, and the text "Sennheiser MKH 416" is visible on the side of the equipment. He is set against a dark grey wall featuring vertical acoustic foam panels. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static side-profile position, facing toward the right of the frame. There is very little movement between the frames; he remains focused on speaking into the microphone, with slight variations in his facial expression and the positioning of his arm and shoulder, suggesting a continuous recording or podcasting session.
